ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_number" INTEGER /* Project number assigned for reference */,
  "dust_score" INTEGER /* Dust score indicating the activity or health of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., RFP, application, library) */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "internal_id" INTEGER /* Internal ID used for tracking */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "install_count" INTEGER /* Number of installations or downloads of the project */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user or team owning the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was completed or is expected to be completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Inactive, Completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated total hours for the project */,
  "actual_hours" INTEGER /* Actual hours spent on the project */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the project */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels for categorizing the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_type FOREIGN KEY ("project_type") REFERENCES project_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the project type (e.g., RFP, application, library) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the owner was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the owner was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the owner is active */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "dependent_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that depends on another project */,
  "dependency_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., library, tool) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was last updated */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dependency is critical for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_dependencies_dependency_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_dependencies_dependent_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the project */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., installs, downloads, users) */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., count, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the user within the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the project */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was last updated */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the note is private and should not be visible to all users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
